purpose: GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs shellcheck linting on all shell scripts and validates that manifest/tools.json is well-formed JSON on every push and pull request to main.
called_by: GitHub Actions (push/PR events on main branch)
invariants: Runs on ubuntu-latest for both jobs
shellcheck job lints all .sh files, bootstrap.sh, and smoke-test at severity=warning
manifest job exits 0 (not 1) if manifest/tools.json does not exist — acceptable on a fresh clone before bootstrap
gotchas: manifest/tools.json is not committed to the repo; its absence is a normal state for fresh clones and is explicitly handled
shellcheck --severity=warning means style/info findings are suppressed; only warnings and errors block CI
